security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://sdk.scdn.co https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://s.ytimg.com https://www.google.com https://www.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.scdn.co https://*.ytimg.com; img-src 'self' https: data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob: data: https: mediastream:; connect-src 'self' https: wss: data: blob:; frame-src 'self' https://sdk.scdn.co https://open.spotify.com https://accounts.spotify.com https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://accounts.google.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; child-src 'self' blob: https:; font-src 'self' data: https:

bundle.shortDescription: Reproductor de musica Aero Liquid Glass
bundle.longDescription: Media player de escritorio con estetica Windows 7 Aero. Reproduce musica local, YouTube y Spotify desde una sola cola unificada con visualizador de audio en tiempo real.
